title: Edinburgh Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Edinburgh, with a Z-Score of -3.20. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Edinburgh are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a heating degree day (HDD) value of 12.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 75%, and the wind speed is moderate at 5.8 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to persist, with no cooling degree days (CDD) currently recorded, indicating no relief from the cold temperatures.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
